objective: Ship the governance-owned Cloudflare Pages Direct Upload deploy gate (Sprint 2 of epic #467). Implements scripts/pages-deploy/pages_deploy_gate.py with two-phase deploy (pre_deploy hook + wrangler pages deploy), Wrangler/CI preflight, build-freshness guard, Pages limit checks, secret redaction, evidence JSON output, deploy and rollback runbooks, consumer config schema, and 15 mocked pytest cases.
scope_boundary: Sprint 2 of 5 of epic #467; implements the reusable Pages Direct Upload deploy gate as a governance-owned script.
No writes to seek-and-ponder or any downstream consumer repo; downstream adoption is seek-and-ponder issue #163.
out_of_scope: seek-and-ponder repo writes; downstream adoption is seek-and-ponder issue #163.
research_summary: Sprint 2 of epic #467. Parent plan approved in issue-467-pages-deploy-gate-structured-agent-cycle-plan.json (issue_number: 468, approved by claude-opus-4-6 + gpt-5.4). Gate requirements derived from Sprint 2 ACs: two-phase deploy (pre_deploy.command runs before wrangler pages deploy), Wrangler/CI preflight (node + wrangler on PATH, wrangler --version capture, CI=true, --non-interactive), build execution + freshness guard (build command exit code, output dir exists/non-empty/mtime guard), Pages limits (file count, per-file size, total size), secret redaction (CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, Authorization: Bearer), evidence JSON on last stdout line, PAGES_DEPLOY_APPROVED=1 enforcement in non-dry-run. Implemented by gpt-5.4 worker; 15/15 pytest cases pass.

sprints.name: Sprint 2 - Reusable Pages Direct Upload deploy gate (issue #469)
sprints.goal: Ship scripts/pages-deploy/pages_deploy_gate.py with 15 mocked pytest cases, consumer schema, and runbooks per Sprint 2 ACs from the parent plan.
tasks: Implement pages_deploy_gate.py: two-phase deploy, Wrangler/CI preflight, build-freshness guard, Pages limits, secret redaction, evidence JSON output, PAGES_DEPLOY_APPROVED enforcement.
Author docs/schemas/pages-deploy-consumer.schema.json declaring project name, build command, output dir, required env vars, optional pre_deploy hook, domain list, and limits.
Author scripts/pages-deploy/tests/test_pages_deploy_gate.py with 15 mocked cases covering all gate failure modes and the happy path.
Record dual-signed cross-review at raw/cross-review/2026-04-21-issue-469-pages-deploy-gate.md and validation at raw/validation/2026-04-21-issue-469-pages-deploy-gate.md.
acceptance_criteria: scripts/pages-deploy/pages_deploy_gate.py exists and all 15 pytest cases pass.
Gate enforces two-phase deploy: pre_deploy.command must exit 0 before wrangler pages deploy is invoked.
Gate checks node + wrangler on PATH before any deploy step; fails with deterministic PREFLIGHT_FAIL messages.
Gate fails closed on missing required env vars with MISSING_ENV: <name> errors (never logs values).
Gate fails closed on build command non-zero exit, missing/empty/stale output dir.
Gate enforces Pages limits: file count, per-file size, total size.
Gate never logs CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN, CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID, or Authorization headers.
Gate emits evidence JSON as last stdout line on success.
PAGES_DEPLOY_APPROVED=1 is required in non-dry-run mode.
